inputs: Define a list of cluster nodes with their corresponding health statuses
Implement a loop that iterates through the list of nodes and calls the wait_for_status function for each node
Customize the script with additional features to enhance the monitoring experience
Monitor a cluster with only one node
Monitor a cluster with multiple nodes of different colors
outputs: Node 1 has reached the specified color status: yellow
Node 1 has reached the specified color status: yellow, Node 2 has reached the specified color status: red, Node 3 has reached the specified color status: green
